content.speakerText: Awesome, thanks for letting me stay late.
content.speakerTextCn: 太好了，谢谢批准我加班。

options.text: No problem, good luck with the report!
I don't care if you stay or not.
You're welcome, but don't do it again.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem, good luck with the report!' 是积极、礼貌且鼓励性的回应，符合职场感谢场景。选项2语气冷漠，选项3不尊重，选项4带有负面暗示，均不符合提升职场印象的要求。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you approving my time off this week.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你批准我这周的休假。

options.text: Sure thing, hope you have a great time!
I didn't really have a choice.
Why are you thanking me? It's just policy.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Sure thing, hope you have a great time!' 是自然、温暖且专业地回应感谢并表达祝福。选项2和3显得消极或不近人情，选项4过于简短且缺乏礼貌，不符合职场礼貌道别标准。

content.speakerText: Thanks for covering my shift yesterday!

options.text: My pleasure! Let me know if you need help again.
I did it because I had nothing better to do.
Don't mention it. Just don't ask me again.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'My pleasure! Let me know if you need help again.' 表达了乐意帮助并开放未来支持，体现团队精神。选项2和3态度消极，选项4带有负面情绪，均破坏积极职场氛围。

content.template: Thanks for letting me stay late. ___ problem, good luck with the report!
content.hint: ���是回应感谢时最常用的礼貌表达之一，表示‘不客气’

content.template: I really appreciate your support. ___ you so much!
content.hint: 表达感谢时最直接的句型，常用于口语结尾
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Thank you so much（非常感谢）

content.template: Thanks for covering my shift. I'm really ___!
content.hint: 比 'thankful' 更正式，更常用于职场表达感激之情
content.knowledgePoint: 高级词汇搭配：be grateful for（对……心怀感激）

content.speakerText: Awesome, thanks for letting me stay late.
content.speakerTextCn: 太好了，谢谢批准我加班。
expectedAnswers: No problem, good luck with the report!
You're welcome—I know you'll do an amazing job.
Of course! Let me know if you need any help finishing up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并给予积极鼓励
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，避免生硬或负面表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'no problem', 'you're welcome', 'good luck', 'let me know' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you approving my time off this week.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你批准我这周的休假。
expectedAnswers: My pleasure! Hope you get some rest and recharge.
You're very welcome—enjoy your time off!
Absolutely! I'm glad I could help. Have a wonderful break!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感激并表达祝福
语言准确性：是否避免使用 'it's just my job' 等削弱感谢的表达
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的口语结构，如 'Hope you...', 'Have a...' 等
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'you're welcome', 'my pleasure', 'enjoy', 'hope you' 等场景高频表达

content.speakerText: Thanks for covering my shift yesterday!
expectedAnswers: Anytime! I'm happy to help out.
No worries at all—I know how busy things get.
You're totally welcome! Let me know if you need backup next time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达乐意帮助并鼓励未来合作
语言准确性：是否避免使用 'I didn't want to' 或 'I had to' 等消极表达
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化但得体的表达如 'anytime', 'no worries', 'totally welcome'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'you're welcome', 'anytime', 'happy to help', 'let me know' 等关键短语
